name: The Golf Factory
address: 63 Randhurst Village Dr, Mt Prospect, IL 60056
about: The Golf Factory is an indoor golf simulator venue that provides a space for golfers to compete, practice, and socialize. The facility is equipped with Trackman simulators, which are recognized as the industry leader in accuracy and simulation. It caters to a wide range of customers, including families, solo players, and groups looking for a relaxed, welcoming environment without strict dress codes or slow play. Pricing is flexible with hourly rates for solo practice and various booking options, alongside memberships for frequent players.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides highly accurate ball and club tracking with 35+ data points
Family-friendly atmosphere with 10 bays available and kid-friendly golf games
Relaxed social environment with food, drinks, and no strict dress codes
Flexible pricing options including hourly rates, early bird, and night owl specials
Extensive course selection with over 500 photorealistic golf courses available

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen serving food, including menu items like empanadas
Full bar service available, with cold beer and other beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar-based launch monitor with AI video swing analysis and multiple screens per bay

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but The Golf Factory does not explicitly mention club rentals on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so outside food and drink may not be permitted, but guests are encouraged to enjoy the on-site offerings.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes around 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Golf Factory is family-friendly with kid-friendly golf games and activities available.
